DP.181.0000:
Rowan: It’s been a long while since
I last entered this room...\f
DP.181.0001:
Rowan: No matter how many times
I come here, I always find myself\r
standing up straighter than usual.\f
DP.181.0002:
Cynthia: If your last time here was
when I became Champion, then yes,\r
that would be quite a long time ago.\f
DP.181.0003:
Cynthia: It’s a natural reaction,
Professor.\f
This room is a legacy to the hopes,
dreams, and struggles of Pokémon\r
and their Trainers to excel.\f
DP.181.0004:
Cynthia: [0103,0000], welcome
to the Hall of Fame.\f
DP.181.0005:
Cynthia: [0103,0000], welcome
to the Hall of Fame.\f
DP.181.0006:
Your names will be recorded for
posterity here.\f
What you are leaving are the memories
of your adventure so far.\f
It’s time to record your names.
You and your Pokémon.\f
Remember, your Pokémon are partners
that grew with you through\r
many challenging battles.\f
This machine will make a permanent
record of your achievement.\f
